DEPT 206 ASBESTOS TRIAL SETTING CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-15-2011 Continued To Feb-16-12 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 503

Specially Appearing Defendant Frasers Boiler Service, Inc.S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Or Stay Action
Off Calendar Mar-30-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Kate Ebrahimi, Esq. of POND NORTH (415-217-1240), appearing for defendant / moving party Fraser Boiler Service
Oren Noah, Esq. of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / opposing parties Robert Cressy, et al.

RULING:
SPECIALLY APPEARING DEFENDANT FRASER BOILER SERVICE, INC.'S MOTION TO DISMISS OR STAY ACTION
No argument presented by the parties and tentative ruling adopted: Specially appearing defendant Fraser Boiler Service, Inc.'s motion to stay based on forum non conveniens is granted in light of plaintiffs' conditional non-opposition. The action is stayed until such time as it is determined whether all defendants are amenable to jurisdiction in Oregon. Order signed in open court. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7707. =(220/HEK)
